prompt_text:
### Demographics: 77-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Atorvastatin (20 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 105.3 kg; Height 183.1 cm; BMI 31.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 115/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 7.7%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 8.5%), FPG (12 months ago 191mg/dL; 9 months ago 166mg/dL; 6 months ago 216mg/dL; 3 months ago 195mg/dL; current 195mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 102.7kg; 9 months ago 107.7kg; 6 months ago 107.7kg; 3 months ago 107.7kg; current 105.3kg), Height (12 months ago 183.1cm; 9 months ago 183.1cm; 6 months ago 183.1cm; 3 months ago 183.1cm; current 183.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 31.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 115mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 46U/L; 3 months ago 47U/L; current 51U/L), AST (12 months ago 38U/L; 9 months ago 37U/L; 6 months ago 45U/L; 3 months ago 44U/L; current 42U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 22mg/g; 9 months ago 20mg/g; 6 months ago 21mg/g; 3 months ago 20mg/g; current 25mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 119mg/dL; 9 months ago 106mg/dL; 6 months ago 100mg/dL; 3 months ago 101mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.8g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 13.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
